Dev log

What shipped, and why

Every change to Clawman lands here first — new detections, things that broke, and the occasional note about what he found in someone else's repo. RSS.

9 July 2026 1.4.0 releasedetection

1.4 — he noticed the directory wasn't there

Context files describe directories. Directories move. Clawman now resolves every path mentioned in every context file and flags the ones that have gone.
18 June 2026 1.3.0 releaseconflicts

1.3 — conflicts now show both sides

Telling you two files disagree is only half a finding. This release shows you both excerpts, with line numbers, so you can resolve it without opening anything.
14 May 2026 1.0.0 release

Clawman 1.0 — somebody has to keep the shelf tidy

Eleven context files, two of them arguing, one describing a directory that was deleted in March. Here's the extension that came out of noticing.
clawman

Context, in good claws.
